_comment: Configuration-driven remedy content. Text/order preserved exactly from the original hardcoded remedyEngine.js to guarantee backward compatibility.

lagnaLordRemedies.template: As the Lagna lord is {lord}, wearing a {gemstone} (after professional consultation) and chanting "{mantra}" is traditionally suggested.
Observing a fast on {day}, the day associated with {deity}, is a traditional practice linked to the Lagna lord.

Mangal Dosha.detail: Reciting the Hanuman Chalisa and worshipping Hanuman on Tuesdays is a traditional remedy associated with Mangal Dosha.

Kaal Sarp Dosha.detail: Performing a Rahu-Ketu shanti puja or Nag Panchami rituals is a traditional remedy associated with Kaal Sarp Dosha.

generalRemedy.detail: Traditional texts also suggest charitable acts — donating food, clothing, or helping the needy — as a general remedy supportive of planetary harmony.
